---
title: "report_structure"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-03-01"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Portfolio Structure: HadCET Seasonal Temperature Analysis

## Cover Page

## Table of Contents

## Contribution Declaration

## Client Report

### Executive Summary

#### Decision Context and Thresholds

#### Headline Findings on Seasonal Shifts

#### Recommendations and Actionable Triggers

#### Evidence Anchors

#### Uncertainty and Decision Risk

### Scope and Data Context

#### Definition of Temporal Baselines

#### Data Sources and Variables

### Findings: Historical and Recent Temperature Changes

#### Claim 1:

#### Claim 2: 

#### Claim 3: 

### Recommendations for Internal Monitoring

#### Metrics for Reporting

#### Definition of Material Change Thresholds

#### Next Analytical Steps

## Technical Report

### Problem Definition

### Methodological Justification

### Statistical Assumptions and Defense

### Validation and Robustness Checks

#### Model Diagnostics

#### Evaluation of Outlier Influence

### Traceability and Audit Narrative

#### Mapping of Claims to Code and Outputs

#### Reproducibility Environment

## Appendices
